name: B2B Sales Pitch
tagline: Dark teal B2B sales pitch deck with lime typography, rounded photo panels, large loop ornaments, and slide-by-slide layouts matching the public source preview sequence.

palette.description: deep teal background, darker teal rounded panels, lime headline/accent typography, and white supporting text

typography.style: large rounded neo-grotesk sales deck typography using a Helvetica/Arial fallback stack for portable HTML

best_for: B2B SaaS and platform sales pitches that need to feel modern, confident, scalable, and visually differentiated without becoming playful.
avoid_for: Highly conservative financial or legal presentations, delicate editorial decks, or contexts where photo-led sales polish would feel too commercial.

source_inspiration.name: SlidesCarnival B2B Sales Pitch Slides
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public slide-preview layout sequence. The template does not reuse source photos or proprietary presentation assets; photo areas are editable placeholders built at matching dimensions.
